What We Do

Roofing and Building Services

A complete roofing and building service for homes across the North West, delivered to a high standard by an experienced local team.

New Roofs and Re-Roofs

Full pitched roof replacements in slate and tile, built to last and finished to a high standard.

Roof Repairs

Leaks, slipped or broken tiles, ridges, valleys and storm damage put right quickly and cleanly.

Repointing

Chimney, ridge and gable repointing to keep water out and your roofline looking sharp.

Roof Cleaning

Moss removal and roof cleaning to protect your tiles and restore your home's kerb appeal.

Flat Roofing

Durable, watertight flat roof systems for extensions, garages, dormers and porches.

Building Work

General building and property maintenance to complement our roofing services.

Why Stormwise

Roofing Done Properly, First Time

We are a local, family-minded roofing and building firm that treats every property like our own. No pressure, no jargon, just honest advice and workmanship that lasts.

Fully Insured and Reliable

Turn up when we say we will and leave every site clean and tidy.

Quality Materials

We use trusted, long-lasting materials on every roof, built to handle British weather.

Skilled Local Tradesmen

Experienced roofers and builders who take real pride in their work.

Fair, Honest Pricing

Clear written quotes with no hidden extras and no hard sell.

Meet the Team

Local Roofers You Can Trust
